name: default-mysql-server
title: default-mysql-server
summary: MySQL database server binaries and system database setup (metapackage)
description:
MySQL database server binaries and system database setup (metapackage)
MySQL is a fast, stable and true multi-user, multi-threaded SQL database
server. SQL (Structured Query Language) is the most popular database query
language in the world. The main goals of MySQL are speed, robustness and
ease of use.
.
This package depends on the default implementation of all the infrastructure
needed to setup system databases.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use default-mysql-server because MySQL database server binaries and system database setup (metapackage).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use default-mysql-server as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair default-mysql-server with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `default-mysql-server --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
